svg.text: RSD LSU + L1D Optimized Pipeline — SelSQ + LRB + D$ Prefetch + WayPred
resume blocks: LSU = selective store-queue lookup + load replay buffer · L1D = next-line prefetcher + way predictor
size[2:0], signExt, destReg, alPtr, lqId, sqPtr
② D$TAG — Tag Access + SQ Lookup (MemoryTagAccessStage)
✦ Store Queue Lookup with Selective CAM (Optimization A) ✦
form LRB_Entry{pc, addr, size, dst, alPtr,
replays directly into D$ADDR (no IQ round-trip)

g.text: entry 0: {addr, dst, alPtr, lqId, reason, mshrId}

svg.text: Replay has priority over fresh scheduler load at D$ADDR
alPtr is newer than redirect point
stall new blocked load at D$DATA (single-lane)
do NOT stall scheduler or other pipes
④ D$RW — Writeback to Physical Regfile
